channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Trump says he's buying a Tesla to show support for Musk as his company faces sagging sales
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With Elon Musk facing escalating political blowback and financial troubles, President Donald Trump said he would buy a Tesla vehicle from his company, an unusual show of support from the president to his most powerful adviser.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump doubles planned tariffs on Canadian steel and aluminum to 50% as trade war intensifies
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump said Tuesday that he will double his planned tariffs on steel and aluminum from 25% to 50% for Canada, escalating a trade war with the United States' northern neighbor and standing unmoved by recent stock market turmoil and rising recession risks.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, ROB GILLIES and MICHELLE PRICE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Middle East latest: Israel kills 8 Palestinians in Gaza and 3 in the occupied West Bank
item.description: Israeli fire has killed eight Palestinians in the Gaza Strip and three more in the occupied West Bank over the past 24 hours, Palestinian officials said Tuesday, even as a fragile ceasefire with Hamas in Gaza has largely held since late January.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Former US Rep. Katie Porter steps into crowded California governor's race
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Former Democratic U.S. House member Katie Porter announced Tuesday that she is entering the 2026 contest for California governor, joining a crowded field of candidates that could be upended if former Vice President Kamala Harris joins the race.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. BLOOD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 4 charged in death of 5-year-old boy 'incinerated' in hyperbaric chamber explosion
item.description: Four people have been charged in the death of a 5-year-old boy who was “incinerated” inside a pressurized oxygen chamber that exploded at a suburban Detroit medical facility, Michigan's attorney general said Tuesday. Thomas Cooper from Royal Oak, Michigan, was pronounced dead at the scene on Jan.
item.dc:creator: COREY WILLIAMS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canada electricity tariffs to target 3 US states
item.description: "If the United States escalates, I will not hesitate to shut the electricity off completely," said Doug Ford.
item.dc:creator: Sierra Campbell, NewsNation

item.title: Texas embalmer accused of cutting off dead man’s genitals surrenders to authorities
item.description: Amber Laudermilk, 34, is charged with felony abuse of corpse following the alleged incident on Feb. 7.
item.dc:creator: Bryce Newberry, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump says TikTok deal is in the works; Here's where things stand with the company
item.description: In less than a month, TikTok could have one or a few new owners, be banned again, or simply receive another reprieve to continue operating in the United States.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: FBI joins search for US college student who vanished in Dominican Republic on spring break
item.description: SANTO DOMINGO, Dominican Republic (AP) — The FBI has joined the search for a 20-year-old University of Pittsburgh student who went missing nearly a week ago while on spring break in the Dominican Republic tourist town of Punta Cana, police said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: UK police arrest a man on suspicion of manslaughter over North Sea ship collision
item.description: LONDON (AP) — British police arrested a man Tuesday on suspicion of manslaughter as they searched for answers about why a cargo ship hit a tanker transporting jet fuel for the U.S. military off eastern England, setting both vessels ablaze.
item.dc:creator: JILL LAWLESS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Vance gives House GOP closing pitch on Trump-backed funding bill ahead of vote
item.description: Vice President Vance delivered a closing pitch in favor of Speaker Mike Johnson’s (R-La.) government funding bill during the House GOP’s private conference meeting Tuesday, hours before the lower chamber is scheduled to vote on the measure.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Dad leads team to state tourney after coach's death
item.description: "I really think that we've helped him through that and he's helped us through this," said Rachel Cordell.
item.dc:creator: Adria Goins/KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Authorities give update on 'wrapped' body found in fishing nets
item.description: No foul play is suspected in the case of the "wrapped" deceased body that was pulled from the ocean by a fishing crew off the coast of Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Trump says he’s buying ‘brand new’ Tesla to support Musk
item.description: President Donald Trump said he would be buying a “brand new” Tesla to support his senior adviser Elon Musk, as the stock market shows shares of the electric car company tumbling.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Family of missing college student asks authorities to broaden search
item.description: DOMINICAN REPUBLIC (WFLA) — The family of a University of Pittsburgh college student who went missing in Punta Cana is asking authorities to broaden their search. Sudiksha Konanki was last seen on March 6 with a young man that authorities are speaking with.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sudiksha Konanki disappearance: Dominican Republic traveler claims resort didn't give info on beach safety
item.description: A traveler who was at the resort in the Dominican Republic when Sudiksha Konanki vanished is claiming there was "no communication" from the hotel over beach safety.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bags fly free no more: Southwest Airlines to end free checked luggage policy
item.description: Southwest Airlines will no longer allow bags to fly free. The airline announced Tuesday it will begin charging some customers who check baggage in May.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Adams, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 15 injured, 1 seriously, when school bus overturns in New Jersey: officials
item.description: At least 14 juveniles were injured when a school bus overturned on the Garden State Parkway in New Jersey on Monday, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump DOT chief rejects inclusion of environmental justice factors in infrastructure decisions
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy on Monday rescinded Biden-era memos that he said called on state agencies to factor a “social justice and environmental agenda” into infrastructure project decisions.
item.dc:creator: ALEXA ST. JOHN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kansas City Chiefs fan's father files lawsuit after 3 Missouri men found frozen in yard
item.description: The Missouri father of a Kansas City Chiefs fan found frozen in a backyard in January 2024 has filed a lawsuit against the two suspects charged in connection with their deaths.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: One of Earth’s most ferocious predators may have looked very different than we thought
item.description: Few prehistoric monsters capture the imagination quite like the megalodon. From natural history museums to the silver screen, this colossal shark, which went extinct over three million years ago, has been depicted as one of the most terrifying and ferocious predators to ever roam the planet.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Stroller accessory recalled after 6 children suffer finger lacerations: CPSC
item.description: Consumers who may have purchased or installed the accessories are being instructed to immediately discontinue use.
item.dc:creator: Talia Naquin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Protestors dispute Vance’s description of clash on street over Ukraine
item.description: In a post on X, Vance said he was confronted by pro-Ukraine protestors while he was with his 3-year-old daughter on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: US added to human rights watchlist over Trump moves
item.description: The United States has been added to CIVICUS's monitor list of potential human rights threats due to President Trump's restrictive executive orders and institutional cutbacks, which are creating an atmosphere to chill democratic dissent.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, KRON4

item.title: Social Security Administration bans reading 'general news' at work
item.description: (The Hill) — The Social Security Administration (SSA) has banned reading “general news” websites at work, according to The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Greenland votes amid Trump invitation to join US: What to know
item.description: Greenland's upcoming national election could set the stage for a later referendum on its future control, as President Trump has renewed his quest to take over the natural resources-rich arctic land.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, KRON4

item.title: Harvard freezes hiring amid financial 'uncertainties' driven by Trump policies
item.description: Harvard University says it is freezing hiring for faculty and staff amid financial “uncertainties” driven by the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: Canada slaps electricity tariffs on New York, Minnesota, Michigan
item.description: This surcharge will affect electricity sales for 1.5 million homes and businesses across Michigan, Minnesota and New York,
item.dc:creator: Tobias Burns, KRON4

item.title: Tampa native Doechii named 2025 Woman of the Year by Billboard
item.description: The rising rapper Doechii has earned the title of Billboard’s 2025 Woman of the Year, landing her in the same company as Taylor Swift, SZA, Lady Gaga and as last year's honoree, Karol G.
item.dc:creator: MARIA SHERMAN AP Music Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Measles case confirmed in Maryland resident who recently travelled abroad
item.description: Early symptoms include a fever higher than 101 degrees, a runny nose, cough and red, watery eyes. A person will experience a red rash one to four days after early symptoms.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Search continues for University of Pittsburgh student missing in Punta Cana
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA)— Authorities in the Dominican Republic are searching for a University of Pittsburgh student who went missing in Punta Cana on March 6.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Top US health agency makes $25,000 buyout offer to most of its 80,000 employees
item.description: The mass email went out to a “broad population of HHS employees," landing in their inboxes days before agency heads are due to offer plans for shrinking their workforces.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Why these 2 states didn't 'spring forward' to daylight saving time this morning
item.description: You may have been groggy this morning thanks to our clocks “springing forward” an hour overnight. Unless, of course, you live in either of the two states that don’t observe daylight saving time.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9
